coverage_note: The bundled F5 population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from F5 thrombin generation, activated protein C resistance, clotting cascade amplification, and venous thrombosis biology and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000198734: F5 coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: F5 findings should be read against thrombin generation, activated protein C resistance, clotting cascade amplification, and venous thrombosis biology; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

rs6025 (Factor V Leiden / R506Q) is curated as a F5 marker for Factor V Leiden thrombophilia context, Venous thromboembolism association research; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
